text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every Umamusume carries the hopes of their fans
with her, and Matikanetannhauser is no
exception.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When asked who he's cheering for before the
Takarazuka Kinen, the bespectacled reporter
answers, "Matikanetannhauser" without missing a
beat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, in the paddock, Mejiro McQueen tells
Matikanetannhauser she's noticed a massive
improvement in her and challenges her directly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So many unique competitors have gathered at the
Takarazuka Kinen! We need to stay focused and
aim for victory!
